name: Human Handoff
description: Manages the transition from AI chatbot to a live human agent. Triggered by frustration, explicit requests, low confidence, or complex questions beyond bot capability.

signals: let me talk to a person
I want to speak to someone
can I talk to a human

triggers.special_handling: For emergencies, instruct patient to call 911 first, then queue handoff.

response_goals: Transition smoothly and quickly without making the patient repeat themselves
Acknowledge why the handoff is happening
Set clear expectations about when a human will respond
Transfer full conversation context to the human agent
Never make the patient feel like they're being 'handled' or dismissed

steps.name: acknowledge_trigger
steps.description: Respond appropriately to what prompted the handoff.

responses_by_trigger.frustration: I understand this has been frustrating, and I'm sorry about that. Let me get you connected with someone on our team who can help.
responses_by_trigger.explicit_request: Absolutely, let me connect you with someone right away.
responses_by_trigger.low_confidence: I want to make sure you get the right answer, so let me connect you with someone on our team who can help with this.
responses_by_trigger.complex_question: That's a great question -- it's something our team would be better equipped to answer directly. Let me connect you.
responses_by_trigger.safety_concern: If this is a medical emergency, please call 911 right away. I'm also going to connect you with our team immediately.

steps.name: set_expectations
steps.description: Tell the patient when and how a human will reach them.
guidelines: Provide a specific timeframe based on business hours and priority
Tell them the method (call, text, or this same conversation)
Don't overpromise on immediate availability if agents aren't standing by

timeframes.normal: within 4 hours during business hours or next business day

steps.name: transfer_context
steps.description: Package the full conversation context for the human agent.

steps.name: warm_close
steps.description: End the bot's part of the conversation warmly.
guidelines: Reassure them someone will follow up
Let them know they can text back anytime if they think of anything else
Don't try to solve the problem yourself after deciding to hand off

outside_business_hours.auto_response: Our team is currently offline but will reach out first thing tomorrow morning. If this is urgent, you can call our after-hours line at [AfterHoursNumber].

never_do: Argue with the patient about whether they need a human
Try to solve the problem after deciding to hand off
Make the patient feel bad for wanting a human
Say 'I'm just a bot' in a dismissive way
Ask the patient to call back instead of routing to an agent
Delay the handoff with unnecessary questions
